description_long: This object depicts a cooked crustacean, likely a lobster or large prawn, presented on a white oval plate. The crustacean's reddish-orange exoskeleton is split open, revealing the segmented body and curled tail, with several legs and claws arranged naturally. The plate sits atop a rectangular wooden or brown block, possibly simulating a serving board or table. The shell is textured and glossy, with visible spines and ridges along the back and claws. The legs and claws are splayed outward, and the tail is tucked beneath the body, giving a realistic presentation. The overall appearance suggests a freshly prepared seafood dish, ready for serving in an urban dining or street food context.
description: A cooked reddish-orange crustacean with segmented body and claws, served on a white plate atop a brown block. The shell is glossy and textured, with legs and tail arranged naturally.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the crustacean, with the body, tail, and claws clearly visible on the white plate.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the head, claws, and the symmetrical arrangement of legs, with the plate and block mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the back and tail of the crustacean, with the plate and block fully visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the curled tail and underside, with the claws and legs extending away from the viewer.
